trends.headline: ML for Optimization leads with 265 papers (+100% vs last quarter)

trend_narratives.narrative: ML for Optimization saw 265 papers this quarter. Top keywords: learning, stochastic, cs.LG. This is the fastest growth rate among all tracked subdomains.
